name: nanyang-logistics-planner
description: A SAP-style logistics planner with Google Sheets-like interface designed for sand and gravel company daily trip management.

scripts.init: git init && git add . && git commit -m "Initial commit"
scripts.deploy: npm run add && npm run commit "Deploy: $(date)" && npm run push
scripts.quick-push: git add . && git commit -m "Quick update: $(date)" && git push origin main
scripts.setup-remote: echo "Please run: git remote add origin <your-github-repo-url>"

author: Your Name
